title: Dispatcher Board — Drag and Drop on Weekly View
description: Re-enable drag-and-drop on the weekly view. Jobs can be dragged between day columns and the unscheduled pool. Dropping on a day column updates scheduledStart to that day at midnight (time preserved if already set). Dropping on pool clears scheduledStart.
acceptanceCriteria: JobCard is draggable using existing dnd-kit setup
Each day column and the unscheduled pool are droppable targets
Dropping a job on a day column sets scheduledStart to that day, preserving existing time if set or defaulting to 08:00
Dropping a job on the unscheduled pool sets scheduledStart to null
Optimistic state update on drop, PATCH /api/jobs/:id on backend, rollback on failure
Visual drag overlay shows job title while dragging
implementationNotes: Build on existing dnd-kit DndContext, useDraggable, useDroppable setup from phase 2
Droppable id for day columns should be the ISO date string of that day (e.g. '2026-04-28')
Droppable id for unscheduled pool is the string 'unscheduled'
Use DragOverlay from dnd-kit for the drag preview
Do not rewrite the weekly view layout from the previous task — extend only
